canonical_definition: A large-scale Chinese dataset for evidence-based medical fact-checking of LLM-generated claims, containing 1,321 questions and 7,409 claim-evidence pairs with veracity labels across five categories: Supported, Partially Supported, Refuted, Uncertain, and Not Applicable.
papers: Extending Automatic Machine Translation Evaluation to Book-Length Documents

definitions.paper: Extending Automatic Machine Translation Evaluation to Book-Length Documents

emnlp25: Extending Automatic Machine Translation Evaluation to Book-Length Documents
